title: The Egghead Siege Begins
description: On pages 2–4, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Luffy, Unknown person #2, Robin, Zoro, Unknown person #3 as The Egghead Incident accelerates as the Marines surround the island, York’s betrayal surfaces, the Straw Hats regroup, Kizaru arrives, and Saturn approaches.
scene: The Egghead Incident accelerates as the Marines surround the island, York’s betrayal surfaces, the Straw Hats regroup, Kizaru arrives, and Saturn approaches.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hello?! Im monkey D. Luffy!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Im the man who will become the pirate King!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What are you doing, Luffy?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They really are as evil as the rumors say!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: beep...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Keep...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We are in an alliance with Dr. vegapunk!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you care about York's safety. Then withdraw your fleet from around the shore!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: WAAAHHHHHH!!! SAVE ME!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Those bastards! How low can they sink?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What's this I'm hearing?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What's happening over there?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: World economic journal headquarters

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What?! Luffy-san?!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: You're straw hat Luffy, correct?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Who is alive with you in the labophase right now?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hmmm... If you count the injured ones, then our number is:

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Kachak-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: BEEP... BEEP...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A woman voice is that nice Robin?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: BEEP...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: talking with them will only give them information, and they must not easily learn about us.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My bad, you're right! But will that make them withdraw their fleet?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Like hell that will happen!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Don't underestimate the Marines!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We have to protect three things.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: First, the physical safety of york; secondly, the "punk Records", which constitute vegapunk's brain; and finally,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The power plant needed to produce the mother flame!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Everything else can be lost, except for those!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But sir, Rob Lucci and his squad are still there...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Alongside with the other either pol agents!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm just con- sidering the worst possi- ble scenario.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: U-Understood Sir!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: WAAAH! THAT HURTS! YOU'LL PAY FOR THAT!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The five elder stars will hear about this!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Go ahead and complain more, we don't care!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Hey calm down Nami! She's Unar. Med!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Are your wounds fee-ling better now, Robin?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Humans are no differ- rent from in- sects...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even if their numbers reduce, they will just multi-tiply again!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Yes sir!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You heard all of that right? I made a deal with the five elder stars!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: IF YOU HURT ME IN ANY WAY THEY WILL ERADICATE THIS ISLAND FROM EXISTENCE!

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: Just like what they did to Ohara!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: UggghhHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHH

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Yes, thanks to you.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hehe! Don't think that will make me happy, you bastard

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ahh! Even though I was facing two of the seraphim, I'm still ashamed of myself!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I know how you feel. Forget about it and get some rest.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: WAAAH!!!! SHAKA!! FYTHAGORAS!! Edison!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Stop Bawling Lilth! I'm trying to connect comms down below!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Edison is still alive, Lilith!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: For the state of vegapunk's satellites, four are heat-vily injured...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: And two are dead.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: As for the straw hat crew...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: What are you whispering over there, Lucci?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: It's nothing. Just Tal- King to myself.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Heeyyy!!!! To ever- YONE DOWN BELOW IS EVERYTHING ALL RIGHT OVER THERE?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Laborary underground basement

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Straw hat crew!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't call them out! They're still our enemies!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Thank you for the food! We owe our lives to you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: We're now saved thanks to you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Get us out of here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: No. We can't do that

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Then at least move us somewhere else!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Because, having these creatures close to us is giving us the creeps!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hmmm, I'm not sure how to use this, but I'm not sure if I'm

dialogue.speaker: Seraphim
dialogue.text: Aren't the Seraphim Your Allies?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well yes, but what if they got out of control again?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Can you assure their safety veganpunk?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Of course! Because those bubbles are made from the same bubble shield used by the Pacific Mark III!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Those bubbles are even bomb blast resistant!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's made with the same properties of sea prison stone!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: How dare they lock us in here!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: which makes them effective weapons against devil fruit users!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's amazing! We thought those were just regular soap bubbles....

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You don't have to worry about us, since we didn't re-ceive any orders to eliminate you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: "You're so no concern to us...
